posts.text:
What is the biggest lesson you learned from your father growing up? 

Share 👇🏽

I thought no one was leaving NY? 

You know things are bad when your Governor is begging New Yorkers to go to Palm Beach & bring the wealthy back.

You wouldn’t have to BEG if you had better policies.

By the way, the mass exodus hasn’t started yet.

Video
Carry yourself in such a way where people seek your friendship and would never risk becoming your enemy.

He should’ve done this 2 years ago, but better late than never.

Conservative voices in Canada need a BACKBONE.

Stop being scared of the media & walking on eggshells. 

Start imposing your ideas every chance you get.

This is a good sign of progress.


Pierre Poilievre (@PierrePoilievre)

Fought for Canadian workers and Canadian interests on the world’s biggest podcast.

Thank you @joerogan for an amazing conversation.

Let’s get tariff-free trade.

Sign up to watch it first: conservative.c

While you’re worrying about small things, someone your age is wishing for one more sunrise. 

Make your day count.

Congrats to Venezuela for winning the entire thing.  

2026 has been a magical year so far for Venezuelan.

It’s almost as if they were destined to win it all.

Of course, I’m rooting for 🇺🇸. 

This one hurts for but respect to the 🇻🇪!
Bryce Harper!!!!!!!
If someone makes you feel like a second option, give them the gift of your absence.

Congrats Venezuela.

Tremendous respect for Italy’s fight. They were true underdogs and fought like hell.

The market loves layoffs.

Reports say Meta may cut 20% of its workforce.

- Employees: 80,000
- 20% cut = 16,000 jobs

Average Meta compensation: $379K

16,000 × $379K = ~$6B annual savings

At a 31.5 P/E, that equals ~$191B in valuation impact.

Meta market cap: $1.6T

That’s roughly 12% of the company.

If true, the stock could jump 5–12% on the announcement.

Since 2021, 23 republican led states have cut income taxes or are planning cuts.  

Meanwhile, blue states keep finding ways to raise taxes.  

Washington just passed a 9.9% tax on capital gaines over $1m. 

Largest migration flows are moving toward Texas, Florida & Tennessee

People underestimate how long it takes to win big.

You struggle for 10 years.  Eventually, in one day, you achieve more than you did your entire life.  

Be patiently aggressive.

State Department cuts the fee to renounce U.S. citizenship from $2,350 to $450, an 80% reduction. 

My ask was to wave the fees but I’ll settle for 80% reduction.


Patrick Bet-David (@patrickbetdavid)

If you hate America, then leave.

Go back to the country you came from and make that country great.

But stop trying to turn America into the place you escaped from.

The current cost to renounce your citizenship is $2,350.

I’d like to propose that the White House waive that fee until 2028 and e

The most valuable thing a father can pass down to his children isn’t money.

It’s character.
Your greatest weapon isn’t money or connections. It’s your mind. Train it to spot opportunities where others see obstacles.

Pay attention to who defends your name when you’re not in the room. 

That’s your true inner circle.

Mamdani has proposed to lower the exemption on the death tax from $7.1 million to only $750k.

He also wants to increase the death tax from 16% to 50%.

NYC has 123 billionaires with an average age of 67 yrs old.

If it passes, NYC will have a $1 trillion+ exodus in wealth.

Video

You have ZERO moral authority to criticize any of the issues below.  

Your policies caused your state to lose a trillion dollars of wealth, twice.

There’s a reason why you’re only polling at 19% on a CNN poll.  

Even democrats fear your policies.


Gavin Newsom (@GavinNewsom)

Donald Trump has wrecked our economy.

We used to be the envy of the world. 

Now, our gas prices are soaring. 

Inflation is up.

Unemployment is sky rocketing. 

And he’s busy in court fighting to TAX the American peo

This can’t be real? 

Who thought this was a good idea?

Video

Very honorable! 

These brave Iranian women need protection from their own regime.


The White House (@WhiteHouse)

"Australia is making a terrible humanitarian mistake by allowing the Iran National Woman’s Soccer team to be forced back to Iran, where they will most likely be killed. Don’t do it, Mr. Prime Minister, give ASYLUM. The U.S. will take them if you won’t..." - @POTUS





— https://nitter.net/WhiteHouse/status/2031014184419197259#m
Iran Executes Saleh Mohammadi, Tulsi Testifies + Trump's Pearl Harbor Joke | PBD 761
According to “Skinny Joey” Merlino, The Mob You Know Is Fake Like UFOs
What Prison Did For This “Mafia Boss”
"Skinny Joey" Merlino Says Jealousy Is Deadly
Joey Merlino: Mafia Boss of the Philadelphia Crime Family? | PBD Podcast #762
Trump Postpones His China Trip To Focus on Iran
NATO Says No To U.S. Military Action Against Iran
Joe Kent Resigns + Trump's Cuba Takeover | PBD #761
Patrick Bet-David on Israel vs America Loyalty Debate
America Paying 16%…And NATO STILL Won’t Back Us
Very interesting.
Exodus hasn't even started yet.
Not a good move on NATO's end.
President Trump is not forgetting.
Can't trust a regime that says "Death upon America"
What are your thoughts on this?
Not a fan of NATO
What a story!
Iran is reportedly planning drone attacks.
It's all happening in your face.
